TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Cal_Bowdler, title = Cal_Bowdler, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Cal_Bowdler} }

S.FORM: Cal Bowdler sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1977, ryax sa tay 31 nqu tay 3, Cal Bowdler, squliq na p'unro. qnxan nya Cal Bowdler mqwas beh Warsaw, Virginia Rappahannock 高中. Cal Bowdler mtzyaw beh Atlanta GA . cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Cal Bowdler sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1977, ryax sa tay 31 nqu tay 3, Cal Bowdler, squliq na p'unro. qnxan nya Cal Bowdler mqwas beh Warsaw, Virginia Rappahannock 高中. Cal Bowdler mtzyaw beh Atlanta GA . cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: ʦ~ʨal βow*ler s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, ʦ~ʨal βow*ler, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. qnxan nja ʦ~ʨal βow*ler mqwas~ɕ βeħ wars~ɕaw, *irɣinia rappaħannoʦ~ʨk **. ʦ~ʨal βow*ler mtzjaw βeħ atlanta ɣa . ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
